calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Aug-16-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Carolyn Morris, Esq. for Plaintiff: George Ballard Company.
Plaintiff's Witness: Paul Mannini, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: P R Painting, a Partnership, and William Ryder ind. and dba P R Painting as follows:
Principal $44,969.94
Interest $11,469.92
Attorney's Fees $1,000.00
Costs $555.00, for a total of $57,994.86
See also Judgment against Co-Defendant: Craig Allen Parsons entered on 05-31-07.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2007 Off Calendar

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2007 Set For Case Management Conference On Jul-27-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion For Order That The Geuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Facts Be Admitted And Compelling Responses To Interrogatories And Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions Including Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Mar-14-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff George Ballard Company's Motion For Order That The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Facts Be Admitted And Compelling Responses To Interrogatories And Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's Request For Admissions, Set No. One, are deemed admitted. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond to Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories, Set No. One, Specially Prepared Interrogatories, Set No. One, and Demand For Identification And Production Of Documents, Set No. One, within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $590, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
